name: Linus Dovas
heading: How to get the fastest work results in Technical SEO for 2025?
description: If you want speed in SEO, stop focusing only on keywords and start focusing on 'Core Web Vitals'. Use Astro or Next.js to get a perfect Lighthouse score. Search engines now prioritize LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) over almost everything else. I managed to rank a Mohali-based client in 3 weeks just by fixing their server response time.

name: Marcus Thorne
heading: Why is this specific error found in my code only during production?
description: 90% of the time, the 'Error not found on localhost' is due to Environment Variables or Case Sensitivity. Linux servers (Firebase/AWS) are case-sensitive, while Windows is not. If you import 'Header.astro' as 'header.astro', it works on your PC but crashes the build in production. Always check your logs for 'Module not found'.

name: Siddharth Sharma
heading: What is the best way to find a high-paying IT job in Mohali?
description: Mohali is becoming the next Bangalore. If you are looking for a job here, focus on QuarkCity or the IT Park in Sector 67. Most companies here like Sebiz or NetSmartz are looking for MERN stack developers. Don't just apply on portals; walk into the offices or use LinkedIn to message the HRs directly. Salaries for 2-year experience are touching 8-12 LPA now.

name: Jeff Richards
heading: New Code Update: What's changing in React 19 and Astro 5?
description: The new update is huge! React 19 is removing the need for 'useMemo' and 'useCallback' with the new React Compiler. Meanwhile, Astro 5 is introducing 'Server Islands' which will allow us to mix static and dynamic content better than ever. This is a game changer for SEO-focused websites.

name: Neil Tyson
heading: Why does Python 3.13 feel so much faster than older versions?
description: The 'Free-threaded' build in the new Python update is finally tackling the GIL (Global Interpreter Lock) problem. For us data engineers, this means actual multi-core processing without the usual hacks. It's a massive update for anyone working in AI or ML in Mohali's tech hubs.

name: Elena Rossi
heading: How to debug 'Firebase Hosting Setup Complete' appearing instead of my site?
description: This happens when your 'firebase.json' is pointing to the wrong folder. If you are using Astro, your public directory should be 'dist', not 'public'. Delete the default index.html that Firebase creates, rebuild your project, and then deploy. That usually fixes the 'Welcome' screen loop.

name: Dr. Jordan
heading: How to handle burnout when you're coding 12 hours a day?
description: Clean your desk before you clean your code. If your physical environment is a mess, your logic will be a mess. In the Mohali tech culture, we often push too hard. Take a walk in the 8B park. Your brain solves problems best when you aren't looking at the screen.
